headline: The Defense Stock You’ve Never Heard Of: Why MP Materials Is a Buy
summary: MP Materials (NYSE: MP) sits at the center of one of the most consequential supply chain shifts in modern American industrial policy. With shares at $58.23, up 138.65% over the past year, the market is pricing in a geopolitical shift that has drawn significant attention: the U.S. has almost no domestic rare earth supply chain, ...
